programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Is there a ghost haunting the Shady Rest Uncle Joe thinks there is a ghost from a guest 50 years ago

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A former girlfriend of Uncle Joe returns to the Shady Rest to see him They had almost married but she ran off with the best man Now the marriage seems like it might happen this time

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy goes after a Springwood teenager whos stuck working at a burger joint owned by his father

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Indebted unhappy married couple Lou and Irene commit a life insurance fraud Lous brother Billy helps him fake his death and leave for Mexico But Irene and Billy fall in love and when Lou returns they claim they dont know him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: A rancher comes after Eric when he befriends a she-wolf who earlier had attacked the rancher for killing her wolf pups

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: An actress complicates an investigation when she tries to play detective in a real life case

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Happy begins sleep-walking due to his insecurity with women Binghamton orders him to be psychiatrically evaluated and shipped out if found unfit for duty So McHale and the guys try to help their Shipmate by fixing him up with a pretty Nurse but must first get around Binghamtons No Fraternization rule

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: The 73 Crews heart-sick Japanese friend Fuji must get a letter to his best girl back home in Japan But a secret mission to mail the letter from a Japanese-held island becomes complicated when Fujis letter gets mixed up in Binghamtons plan to distribute propaganda leaflets to the enemy

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter and an old war buddy credit each other for being war heroes

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer decides to find a girl of his own after meeting Sergeant Carters girlfriend

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An ape man wreaks havoc on the island and frightens the castaways who dont realize that he is actually a Hollywood actor preparing for a role

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E17
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E17

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E24
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E24

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is assigned to protect the winner of the Miss USA contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: An Arabian prince is protected by Max and an Israeli agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ becomes involved in the dizzy antics of a couple of inexperienced female detectives Lorrie Mahaffey and Rebecca Reynolds tracking a low-down Lothario who romances elderly women to steal their fortunes

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Hong 115
programme.desc: Hong 115

programme.title: Hong 116
programme.desc: Hong 116

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: George Babyface Nelson became one of the most important gangsters of 1930s Chicago by making brutal robberies In order to compete with Al Capone he allied himself with John Dillinger

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Dale Reinhart pursues the girl who dumped him and dresses in drag to get the only available cabin Bickering Maury and Stella Marshall get stuck in a elevator Janette Bradford is followed by the PI her husband hired to keep tabs on her

programme.title: Deep Space
programme.desc: A spaceship with a hideous monster with an incredible appetite for flesh crashes to Earth Unsuspecting policemen Ian Mclemore and Jerry Merris investigate the wreckage They discover several small pods which they remove

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hazzard Jail is the meeting place for Black Jack Bender and a group of syndicate kingpins who are conspiring to smuggle illegal weapons in the area Bo and Luke - with a little help from Uncle Jesse Daisy and their friends Cletus and Cooter - use some good ol southern smarts to keep the mobsters at bay until the FBI can arrive to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 220
programme.desc: Hercules 220

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The ANA negotiate amnesty for all resistance members Liam tries to convince resistance member Halley Simmons to take the offer Sandoval uses parasites to make volunteers do suicide missions against the resistance

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team is sent to Grovers Mill when it is discovered the 1938 radio broadcast of invasion was real They meet with a group of local men who successfully fought the Martians 50 years ago and believe the Martians have returned to try and retrieve weapons abandoned in 1938

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A vengeful voodoo priestess ensnares Arcane in a voodoo curse as revenge for his enslavement of Jim Kipp who had once saved a cousin of hers from drowning Alec helps Graham and a kindly voodoo priest save Arcane from certain dea

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed psychic comes to the swamp in search of Alec Holland with a message from his dead wife Linda She also reveals that Jim is still alive and will be heard from soon

programme.title: Space 1999The Final Message From Moonbase Alpha
programme.desc: Space 1999The Final Message From Moonbase Alpha

programme.title: Space 1999The Final Message From Moonbase Alpha
programme.desc: Space 1999The Final Message From Moonbase Alpha

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Everyone except Heath who has met the stranger and knows some of his exploits firsthand extends a warm welcome to the aging cowboy who killed the murderer of patriarch Tom Barkley during the Barkley-Railroad War The man as it turns out is a friend to no one Hes a sociopath and mercenary who enjoys range wars and will sell his sanguinary services to either side And hes looking for work

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: His gear stolen Cheyenne follows the thief and killer to a small town The outlaw has stopped there to see the sheriff - his father The sheriff resigns so Cheyenne takes the job and falls for a girl whos father was the sheriff

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three escaped convicts leave a path of destruction behind them as well as causing friction between Keller and his girlfriend Connie

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time The mission to recover two nuclear warheads belonging to General Rio Dominguez from a hotel vault in Santa Costa Jim and Willy sneak safe-cracker Terry Targo into the vault who figures out how to get out The team then captures Dominguez but Targos fingers are broken in the attempt With no other alternative Briggs has himself and Dominguez put into the vault and Briggs threatens to enter a random combination if Alicio doesnt tell him the code Dominguez breaks With the bombs defused Willy takes the warheads out of the vault Briggs remains behind and uses the information Targo gathered earlier to get out during a fireworks distraction set off by Barney Briggs and the rest of the team make a desperate race for safety and get onto a plane heading to safety seconds before the military can catch up to them

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles current boss A warehouse owner with a terminal disease wants to help Dr Kimble by impersonating him leading Lt Gerald to the Country of Greece and dying at sea

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: Truckers form a mile-long convoy in support of a truckers vendetta with an abusive sheriff - Based on the country song of the same title by CW McCall

programme.title: Avenging Force
programme.desc: A senator is targeted by the Pentangle a right wing paramilitary group His pal a former CIA agent and martial artist tries to help him The group kidnaps the agents sister and tries to hunt him down The Most Dangerous Game style

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Elvis Vukaj vs. Randy Mahon; Keegan Oliver vs. Blake Sigvaldason

programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Greg Steen v. Elvis Vukaj.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Chris McMillan as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget has a double mission not only to retrieve a pearl necklace but also to stop the gang from making an alliance with Chow

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kil reduces Leader-1 Scooter and Turbo to the size of toys but when the tiny Guardians escape their enemies must shrink themselves to go in pursuit

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades try to take over GoBotron by replacing the Guardian leaders with robotic ringers

programme.desc: Maori Chief Kaitaia has a map to Glow Worm Grotto tattooed on his back VENOM needs this information to find the grotto and steal the pearl treasure inside

programme.desc: A radioactive meteor crashes on Earth and VENOM steals it by disguising Switchblade as a UFO
